title: Selectable Watches buttons
text: Selectable Watches buttons Refer to the Selectable Watches buttons to select or deselect items, add watches, or refresh content. Icon Action Description Select all items Selects all items in Selectable Watches . Deselect all items Clears all items in Selectable Watches . Add watches Adds all selected items in the Selectable Watches to the Watches pane of the debugger. You can add watches even if the debugger is not in control. However, the values of the added watches are not evaluated until control returns to the debugger. Refresh context Refreshes the contents of Selectable Watches to the current context of the running application or component (for instance, after returning from an activated component).
